title: Shopify Operations & Inventory Manager — Firearms, Optics & Outdoor E-Commerce Store
brief: I own and operate a Shopify-based e-commerce store selling thermal cameras, night vision optics, firearms, ammunition, trail camera mounts, and hunting accessories. I am looking for a detail-oriented Shopify operations specialist to manage distributor data feeds, inventory sync, and catalog maintenance on an ongoing basis. This role starts as a setup/cleanup project and transitions to a monthly retainer once the foundation is in place. I am a hands-off owner — I need someone who can work independently, flag issues proactively, and keep things running without daily supervision. All communication will be handled through Upwork messaging only. Phase 1 — Initial project (4–6 weeks, estimated 20–40 hours total) Finalize StockSync REST API connection with primary distributor covering optics, firearms, and ammunition Resolve 682+ weekly 404 errors caused by out-of-stock and delisted products Set up and test a second distributor feed (hunting accessories and trail cameras) with no product overlap with the primary feed Establish clean pricing rules, MAP enforcement, and inventory sync schedules for both feeds Audit and clean up product catalog — titles, descriptions, tags, and imagesPhase 2 — Ongoing retainer (5–10 hours per month) Monitor and maintain both distributor feeds (pricing, availability, sync errors) Manage 404 errors and broken product links on an ongoing basis Add new products and collections as distributor catalogs expand — including firearms and ammunition as the store
